description: Capabilities for every PowderMonkey window. The UI needs the webview's own network access (fetch/WebSocket to the chosen supervisor), which CSP gates — see tauri.conf.json's security.csp — plus the opener plugin so external links (terminal URLs, PR/review links) open in the OS default browser rather than the webview. On top of that, real windows (docs/windows.md): any window can open another (Cmd/Ctrl-N → a WebviewWindow) and close itself (Cmd/Ctrl-W), so the create/close permissions are granted here. The window glob covers the boot window (main) and every spawned window (pm-*).
